introSection: Flotte Biene was a steel roller coaster formerly located at Trampolino Familien- und Freizeitpark in Andernach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The coaster opened on 13 May 2008.

On 17 August 2009, the park published a article to it's website, stating that the ride had been successful, and that it would receive larger cars, and a "faster and longer ride" for the next season.

Flotte Biene closed for refurbishment on 30 September 2009.

By 2010, all articles related to the coaster were removed from the park's website, and by 2011, the ride had been dismantled.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The coaster was a Tube Coaster model built by ABC Rides.

fullText:
Flotte Biene was a steel roller coaster formerly located at Trampolino Familien- und Freizeitpark in Andernach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

The coaster opened on 13 May 2008.

On 17 August 2009, the park published a article to it's website, stating that the ride had been successful, and that it would receive larger cars, and a "faster and longer ride" for the next season.

Flotte Biene closed for refurbishment on 30 September 2009.

By 2010, all articles related to the coaster were removed from the park's website, and by 2011, the ride had been dismantled.

The coaster was a Tube Coaster model built by ABC Rides.
